sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14622" key="a)pwrwsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπωρ-ωσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">absence of callus,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
